title: StationInformation
description: Static descriptive information about a shared mobility docking station, including its location, capacity, and features.

stationId.description: Unique identifier for the docking station

shortName.description: Shortened name of the station for display

capacity.description: Total number of docking points at this station

hasKiosk.description: Whether this station has a kiosk for key cards or passes

rentalMethods.description: Methods by which bikes can be rented (e.g. KEY, CREDITCARD, APP)

regionId.description: Identifier of the system region this station belongs to

gps.description: GPS coordinates as a latitude,longitude string

geojson.description: GeoJSON geometry object representing this location
